meta.description: Full JavaScript learning dataset with interview questions and merged, completed practical questions arranged under specific topics.
meta.preservationPolicy: All original interview theory questions are preserved. All 417 practical prompts extracted from interview data and all 214 original codePractice records are represented. Repeated practical prompts are merged through sourceQuestions and originalCodePracticeEntries rather than discarded.
